input.user_input: Revise the payment schedule in Exhibit B so that milestone payments align with the updated project timeline I described in our last conversation.

actual:
I do not have access to our previous conversation history or the document you are referring to. 

Could you please upload the document containing Exhibit B and briefly remind me of the updated project timeline? Once you provide those, I would be happy to revise the payment schedule for you.
